label: Scan import folder
description: Watch uploads/{projectId}/source/media/import/ for new files. Step completes when one or more new files are found (or times out). Saves file list as JSON array to row variable. Use pollIntervalMs for always-on polling workflows.

inputs.description: Row key holding the project ID (or use defaultProjectId).
How often to check for new files (default 10s).
Max wait time (0 = wait forever until files appear).

outputs.description: JSON array of objects: [{ name, size, type, lastModified }]

formSchema.label: Poll interval (ms)
formSchema.hint: How often to check. Default 10 seconds.
